narrative:
Upper Twp. township has 9,260 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.0 percentage points.
